project_metadata.name: E-Commerce Sales Demo Project
project_metadata.description: A demo data project containing transactional records for analytics modeling.

resources.description: Monthly record of store sales transactions including amounts, dates, customer IDs, and product categories.

fields.name: transaction_id
fields.description: Unique auto-incrementing ID identifying each purchase.

fields.name: date
fields.description: Date when the transaction took place (formatted as YYYY-MM-DD).

fields.name: amount
fields.description: Total purchase transaction amount in USD.

fields.name: region
fields.description: Geographical sales territory region (East, West, North, South).

fields.name: product_category
fields.description: Classification group of the purchased item (e.g. Electronics, Apparel).

agent_instructions: To perform regional revenue aggregation, query the mock_data/sales.csv dataset, sum the 'amount' field, and group by the 'region' or 'product_category' fields. For forecasting models, parse the 'date' field into a datetime object.
